appliedBodyType.title: appliedBodyType
appliedBodyType.description:
The body type filter that was applied. 
Returns ALL if no filter was used.

message.title: message
message.description:
Status message indicating success or error. 
If no vehicles found for selected body type 
agent should ask user to choose a different 
body type.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description:
Total number of vehicles returned for the 
selected body type.

vehicleDisplayList.title: vehicleDisplayList
vehicleDisplayList.description:
Clean numbered list of vehicle names on separate 
lines. Display this exactly as returned to the 
user without any modification or reformatting.

vehicleIdMap.title: vehicleIdMap
vehicleIdMap.description:
Number to vehicleDefinitionId and modelCode mapping 
in format 1##VehicleId##ModelCode||2##VehicleId##ModelCode.
Split on || to get entries then split each entry 
on ## to get:
Part 1 = number
Part 2 = vehicleDefinitionId
Part 3 = modelCode (pass this to Electra_Agent_Template 
as Vehicle_Model_Number when calling review summary)
Store all parts silently. Never show to user.
